response:
With reference to the email below and [Regulatory Authority]'s instructions, [Client/Consultant Name] and [Consultant Name] will conduct a QA/QC audit of [Company Name]'s office on [Date]. This requirement is mandatory from [Regulatory Authority] to commence work on this project.

Please arrange and confirm the details via email. A draft response is prepared below:

***

**Subject:** Confirmation of QA/QC Audit – [Project Name]

Dear [Recipient Name],

We acknowledge the requirement from [Regulatory Authority] regarding the mandatory QA/QC audit to be conducted by [Client/Consultant Name] and [Consultant Name].

We confirm that [Company Name] is prepared to host the audit at our office on [Date]. Please let us know the specific time of arrival and if any additional documentation or personnel are required to be present.

We look forward to your confirmation to proceed.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
